name: text/color/placeholder
description: Placeholder text. Empty-state hints in inputs. AA on sunken (light 6.07, dark 6.75); AAA on HC (n.10 sur sunken n.150 light, n.190 sur sunken n.10 dark).

name: text/color/disabled
description: Disabled text. Controls that can't be interacted with. AA on sunken (light 6.07, dark 6.75); AAA on HC (n.10 sur sunken n.150 light, n.190 sur sunken n.10 dark). Distinguishable from primary via opacity 0.5 in components.css.

name: text/color/inverse
description: Text on solid/colored surfaces (e.g. white on primary).

name: text/color/accent
description: Accent text. Inline links, brand emphasis.

name: text/color/on-accent
description: Text on top of the accent (gold) surface — e.g. .btn-toggle.active. Default = neutral.0 (black) sur gold. Vision achromatopsia : accent bascule en grayscale, donc on-accent doit s'inverser pour conserver le contraste. Light ach : accent=neutral.25 (sombre) → on-accent=neutral.200 (clair). Dark ach : accent=neutral.190 (clair) → on-accent=neutral.25 (sombre).

name: text/color/on-dim
description: Text on surface.dim — white fixe. Pendant de on-accent pour la surface sombre fixe (HC SegCtrl track, input HC).

name: text/color/on-bright
description: Text on surface.bright — black fixe. Pendant de on-dim pour la surface claire fixe (HC SegCtrl tile active).

name: status/success/bg
description: Success state (completed action, OK) — background tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : bg saturé (light n.50, dark n.150) inversé pour atteindre 3:1 vs canvas (badge claque).

name: status/success/text
description: Success state (completed action, OK) — text on the tint. Vague 8.5 — HC : text inversé (light n.190, dark n.0) pour AAA contre le bg HC saturé.

name: status/success/bg-hover
description: Status.success.bg hover — Donnie pattern (currentColor 8%). Fallback: success.175.
